message:
refactor(schema): migrate to shared quote_ident/sanitize_identifier (bd-14xl)

Migrate the schema crate to use shared SQL identifier utilities from
sqlmodel-core instead of ad-hoc implementations:

- lib.rs: Use quote_ident() for drop_table() instead of inline .replace()
- create.rs: Remove private quote_ident(), import from sqlmodel_core
- introspect.rs: Remove local sanitize_identifier(), import from sqlmodel_core

The migrate.rs sanitize_table_name() is intentionally kept as defense-in-depth
for migration table names (alphanumeric-only is stricter than needed).

All 157 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
